meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Infinix repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Infinix Repair Winnipeg | Screen & Battery Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: Infinix phone repair in Winnipeg. Screen, battery, charging port repair for Infinix Note, Hot, Zero & GT series. Underserved market specialists.
page.heroDescription: Can't find Infinix repair in Winnipeg? We're one of the few shops serving the Infinix community.

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Replace cracked Infinix screens affordably in Winnipeg—Note, Hot, and GT series.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore battery life to your Infinix device with quality replacements.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: Fix USB-C charging port issues for reliable 33W to 100W fast charging.

services.name: Camera Repair
services.description: Repair front and rear cameras on all Infinix devices.

services.name: Speaker Repair
services.description: Fix DTS speakers, earpieces, and audio quality issues.

services.name: Power Issues
services.description: Diagnose and fix power button, boot loops, and startup problems.

advantage_pillars.title: Infinix Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: One of the few Winnipeg shops with Infinix repair expertise.

advantage_pillars.title: Underserved Market Experts
advantage_pillars.description: Filling the gap for Infinix owners who can't find repair elsewhere.

advantage_pillars.title: Affordable Repairs
advantage_pillars.description: Budget-friendly pricing matching Infinix's value proposition.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier (30 days to lifetime). 90-day battery warranty. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs.

models_description: We repair all Infinix models including Note, Hot, Zero, Smart, and GT gaming series.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Infinix repair costs are generally affordable. Infinix's official support page provides model-specific troubleshooting.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Infinix owners are often pleasantly surprised that repairs are more affordable than other brands. iFixit's repair guides can help understand common repairs.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: For budget Infinix devices, repair almost always makes financial sense.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: When repair doesn't make sense, data recovery is often still possible.

faqs.question: Do you repair Infinix phones in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Yes! We're one of the few shops in Winnipeg that services Infinix devices.

faqs.question: Are Infinix parts available in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: We can source parts for most Infinix models.

faqs.question: Is Infinix repair affordable?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! As a budget-friendly brand, Infinix repairs are typically very affordable.

faqs.question: Do you repair Infinix GT gaming phones?
faqs.answer: Yes! We service the Infinix GT gaming series.

faqs.question: How long does Infinix repair take in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Most repairs are completed same-day if parts are in stock.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB. Walk-ins welcome or book online.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
